## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests (negotiation/semver changes need tests first)
- [ ] For `@knitkit/runtime`: `npm run --workspace=@knitkit/runtime size` is still under budget
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npm run changeset`) if this affects a published package
- [ ] Stayed within scope (no bundler plugin / cross-remote HMR / automatic transitive sharing)
